MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kenneth Sperandio, via ZOOM, for Janesta Downey, Petitioner.

The court begins by querying counsel regarding the status of an ex parte petition to consolidate this matter with the existing case number as previously instructed. Counsel reports that a dismissal was filed in the previous matter. The court advises counsel that filing a dismissal in probate matters does not close the case and should not preclude him from petitioning to consolidate the matters. The court then instructs counsel to file an ex parte application to consolidate this matter with the existing case by the next calling of this matter and to contact the assigned Examiner with any questions.

The Petition for Approval of Former Trustee's Accounting is continued to 9/27/2021 at 9:00 am in in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.
